title: [MTR3/4]South Australian Trains
description: This resourcepack adds South Australian Trains for MTR3/MTR4
body:
This resource pack adds South Australian Trains for MTRMOD

This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (MTR4-beta 11)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

For MTR3, you need to go through the [onedrive download centre](https://1drv.ms/f/c/d1eb72ccedcc8232/EjKCzO3McusggNG1AgAAAAAB7ccxNOTE_E0Gu5vhX6RNKQ?e=yRkLLi) and download Australian national pack or download MTR3 Version in modrinth (recently uploaded)

</details>


Before using, please check the Readme included inside the pack!

### Contents

* NR Class Locomotive (Pacific National/Indian Pacific livery)
* Stainless Steel Carriage (Indian Pacific/The Overland)
* Container train
* Bluebird Railcar
